kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\kenny\\Documents\\ProjectOrderly\\Orderly\\frontend\\browser\\traces\\temp\\a930fa3c-f481-47e6-8808-3fd2f54b0f62"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: Customer Can View Order Confirmation From Order History

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=a[href="/login"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=input#email at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'orderhistory1@test.com' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'Password123!' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=a[href="/order-history"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=a[href="/profile"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector role=heading[name="Order History"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=(//strong[starts-with(normalize-space(),'Order #')])[1] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//h2[starts-with(normalize-space(),'Order #')] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg:
Text: 'Your pause, perfected.
Welcome, Order!
|
Home
|
Profile
|
Order History
|
Logout

Cart

Order #23

Date: 3/31/2026, 8:45:50 PM

Status: PENDING

Items

Classic Burger (Single Patty)

Quantity: 2

Unit Price: $9.99

Item Total: $19.98

Totals

Tax: $0.00

Total: $19.98

© Quick Sip Cafe 2026'

${page_text} = Your pause, perfected. Welcome, Order! | Home | Profile | Order History | Logout
Cart
Order #23
Date: 3/31/2026, 8:45:50 PM
Status: PENDING
Items
Classic Burger (Single Patty)
Quantity: 2
Unit...
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: US3.4.1 - Confirmation is visible by opening an order from order history

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.name: Frontend Tests

test.name: App Navigation Hides Profile Link When Not Authenticated

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain Link
kw.msg: Current page does not contain link 'Profile'.
kw.doc: Verifies link identified by ``locator`` is not found from current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Link
kw.doc: Verifies link identified by ``locator`` is found from current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Link
kw.doc: Verifies link identified by ``locator`` is found from current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: Browser equivalent of the unauthenticated app navigation Jest test.

test.name: App Navigation Shows Profile Link When Authenticated

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Frontend smoke and workflow tests aligned to the existing SeleniumLibrary keyword structure. This file converts the Jest frontend tests into browser-level Robot tests that fit the existing suite. Mock-only Jest cases were omitted because they are not reliable browser tests without controlled API mocking.

test.name: Logged In User Can View Order History Page

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Link
kw.doc: Clicks a link identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.name: Order History Shows Empty State When No Past Orders Exist

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait For Order History To Finish Loading
Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Page Should Not Contain
kw.msg: Current page does not contain text 'Loading order history...'.
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'No past orders found.'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\kenny\\Documents\\ProjectOrderly\\Orderly\\frontend\\browser\\traces\\temp\\0fed0fe8-70e2-4a25-b6d5-de4ae40b7aec"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Context
kw.doc: Create a new BrowserContext with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost:3000/
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

test.name: Product Cards Render On StoreFront

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.product-grid at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Product Card Count Should Be Greater Than Zero
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Product Card Count Should Be Greater Than Zero
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.arg: Product Card Count Should Be Greater Than Zero
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current window or element and saves it to disk.
